RULING: A dismissal having been filed on August 11, 2017, the Court vacates the tentative ruling and orders DEFENDANT NATALJA SUST MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT off calendar. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR # 11216, email: gaiavao@sftc.org.
